info.description:
API used to create a new incident within 10-8 Systems CAD. To obtain credentials, login to 10-8 Systems and go to Management -> Integrations -> API Keys. The key and secret are unique to each 10-8 Systems customer and are used for authentication.
Endpoint https://interface.10-8systems.com
info.title: New Incident API

post.description: Adds an incident to the CAD system

BasicAuth.description:
To obtain credentials, login to 10-8 Systems and go to Management -> Integrations -> API Keys. The key and secret are unique to each 10-8 Systems customer and are used for authentication.
Username: API Key
Password: Secret

location.example: 2000 E Gene Autry Way, Anaheim, CA 92806

cross_street.example: E Orangewood Avenue / S State College Blvd

apt_ste.description: Apartment, suite, or other number used to identify sub-premise.

locnotes.description: Description of location or additional details to help responders find location.

dispatcher.description: Name of service or user creating incident.

require_acknowledge.description: Determines whether or not a dispatcher has to manuall acknolwedge incident within 10-8 Systems when being created.

units.description: Comma-separated list of unit numbers assigned to incident. Must match exact unit numbers within 10-8 Systems.

summary.example: Caller requesting officers for male acting suspicious
summary.description: Description of incident. Can be HTML formatted.

id.description: 10-8 Systems unique ID for this incident

location.example: 2000 E Gene Autry Way, Anaheim, CA 92806

xstreet.example: E Orangewood Avenue / S State College Blvd

questions.description: JSON array of agency-configured question and answer objects based on call type.

timestamp_closed.description: UNIX timestamp of time incident was closed. 0 if incident not closed

id.description: 10-8 Systems unique ID for this unit's response

callID.description: 10-8 Systems unique ID for this call this unit is assigned to

unitID.description: 10-8 Systems unique ID for this unit

status.description: Dispatched, En Route, On Scene, Transporting, At Destination, Cleared

dispatched.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

enroute.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

onscene.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

transporting.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

destination.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

complete.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

time_dispatched.description: UNIX timestamp in seconds, null if blank

isPrimary.description: 0 => Unit is not primary unit on incident, 1 => Unit is primary on incident

id.description: 10-8 Systems unique ID for this comment

time.description: String timestamp converted to local agency timezone, blank if empty

userID.description: 10-8 Systems unique ID for the user adding this comment

comment.example: Caller requesting officers for male acting suspicious

type.description: initial, cjis, alert, system, or blank

isEdited.description: 0 => comment has NOT been edited, 1 => comment has been edited
